title: Drone attack
title_en: Drone attack
title_uk: Атака дронов
description: Controlled "Shakheds" are flying deeper and deeper into the rear of Ukraine, writes "Flash". According to the adviser to the Minister of Defense, Russia is more actively using Mesh-modems for control and reconnaissance of "Shahed" and "Gerber" drones. This technology makes it possible to transmit a signal between UAVs by chain directly in the air. The essence of the scheme is that some drones fly high and work as signal repeaters, while others go lower and attack...
description_en: Controlled "Shakheds" are flying deeper and deeper into the rear of Ukraine, writes "Flash". According to the adviser to the Minister of Defense, Russia is more actively using Mesh-modems for control and reconnaissance of "Shahed" and "Gerber" drones. This technology makes it possible to transmit a signal between UAVs by chain directly in the air. The essence of the scheme is that some drones fly high and work as signal repeaters, while others go lower and attack...
description_uk: Управляемые «Шахеды» залетают все глубже в тыл Украины, пишет «Флэш» По словам советника министра обороны, россия активнее использует Mesh-модемы для управления и разведки дронами «Шахед» и «Гербера». Такая технология позволяет передавать сигнал между БпЛА по цепочке прямо в воздухе. Суть схемы в том, что часть дронов летит высоко и работает ретрансляторами сигнала, а другие — идут ниже и атакуют...

The apartment was given to him by Rinat Akhmetov, the founder of the Foundation and the president of Shakhtar FC. "This apartment is actually really great. I will be able to do music, play the accordion, because it is the highest floor and there are almost no neighbors nearby. The apartment has a lot of space. It...

title: Air defense active
title_en: Air defense active
title_uk: Активна ППО
description: This year, Ukraine has already received twice as many interceptor drones as in the whole of 2025, - Fedorov According to him, such drones are already actively used to shoot down Shahed and other UAVs and are part of the small air defense system. In March, a record 33,000 people were shot down with their help. дронов. Fedorov noted that they are much cheaper than missile systems and allow to unload classic air defense.
description_en: This year, Ukraine has already received twice as many interceptor drones as in the whole of 2025, - Fedorov According to him, such drones are already actively used to shoot down Shahed and other UAVs and are part of the small air defense system. In March, a record 33,000 people were shot down with their help. дронов. Fedorov noted that they are much cheaper than missile systems and allow to unload classic air defense.
description_uk: Украина в этом году уже получила вдвое больше дронов-перехватчиков, чем за весь 2025-й, - Федоров По его словам, такие дроны уже активно используются для сбивания Shahed и других БПЛА и входят в систему малой ПВО. В марте с их помощью сбили рекордные 33 тыс. дронов. Федоров отметил, что они значительно дешевле ракетных систем и позволяют разгрузить классическую ПВО.

title: 60 missiles launched
title_en: 60 missiles launched
title_uk: Випущено 60 ракет
description: Over the past week, the Russian Federation launched about 1,900 attack drones, almost 1,400 guided aerial bombs and about 60 missiles of various types over Ukraine. This underlines the timeliness of the new contributions from the partners to the PURL programme, as well as the approval of the 20th EU sanctions package and the €90 billion European support package in Cyprus. Thanks to all partners who help. Our anti-aircraft system...
description_en: Over the past week, the Russian Federation launched about 1,900 attack drones, almost 1,400 guided aerial bombs and about 60 missiles of various types over Ukraine. This underlines the timeliness of the new contributions from the partners to the PURL programme, as well as the approval of the 20th EU sanctions package and the €90 billion European support package in Cyprus. Thanks to all partners who help. Our anti-aircraft system...
description_uk: Упродовж минулого тижня РФ випустила по Україні близько 1900 ударних дронів, майже 1400 керованих авіаційних бомб і близько 60 ракет різних типів. Це підкреслює, наскільки вчасними є нові внески партнерів до програми PURL, а також схвалення 20-го санкційного пакета ЄС та європейського пакета підтримки в 90 млрд євро на Кіпрі. Дякую всім партнерам, хто допомагає. Наша система протиповітряної...
